3060720.name: Guilty Gear -Strive- Season Pass 4
3060720.description:
[GGST Season Pass 4 Content]

An exciting season pass that includes 4 additional playable characters, stages and season 4 pass bonus character colors as additional DLC for the Guilty Gear -Strive- game.

*Be aware that GGST Season Pass 4 can be purchased as a bundle or on its own. Please be careful to ensure you do not make a duplicate purchase.

[GGST Season Pass 4 Content]

・DLC Season 4 Characters Additional Colors

・DLC character #14 Queen Dizzy

・DLC character #15 Venom 

・DLC character #16 Unika

・DLC character #17 Lucy (Cyberpunk: Edgerunners) 

・DLC stage #7 "In the Name of Peace"

・DLC stage #8 "New Dawn, A Future Unfolding"

・[Season Pass 4 Purchase Bonus] Season Pass 4 Premium Color (Color for 31 characters available on release)

*Purchasing the main product is required to access this content. You will also need to have downloaded the latest updates.
3060720.supported_languages:
英语*, 日语*, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 韩语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
*具有完全音频支持的语言
